form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up in the past. form.formComment: Gelding back from a spell of six months. Has placed previously first up from a break. form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Most recently favourite; won by a head at this track Mdn-Sw March 12 over 1250m on a rain affected track defeating Stellar Legend with 56.5kg at $3.10. The race before that sat on the pace when 3rd of 8 at this track Mdn-Sw on February 16 over 1250m, in the wet; 0.7 len behind Mr Oreo with 56.5kg at $6.50. Draws well and she will be around the mark.
